top_tweets.text: Not enough people talk about this: you can design in Figma, copy the CSS in Dev Mode, drop it into Claude, and it’ll build exactly what you designed.
top_tweets.author: BrettFromDJ
top_tweets.name: Brett
top_tweets.summary_zh: Figma 的 Dev Mode 可以直接複製 CSS，再丟給 Claude 讓 AI 建構出與設計稿一致的結果，但討論中較少人提及這個工作流。

top_tweets.text:
I hated how bad agents are at design

I hated how Codex can't access Mobbin

So I created Lazyweb

- 257k+ screens (apps/web)
- 6 opinionated design research skills
- 1 MCP (Claude/Codex)

100% Free...AI native...no rate limits...no subscriptions..

Enjoy (and tell a friend) 🫡 https://t.co/ThpxaJGG2K
top_tweets.author: abouelatta_ali
top_tweets.name: Ali Abouelatta
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者推出 Lazyweb 工具，整合 257k+ 螢幕截圖與 6 種設計研究技能，讓 Claude 或 Codex 等 AI 代理能存取 Mobbin 等級的設計資源，完全免費且無速率限制。

top_tweets.text:
Marc Andreessen says Elon Musk runs 120 design reviews a day in 5-minute slots.

He does this while running six different companies at once.

Andreessen says Elon maps each company as a production process.

Each process has one bottleneck — the single thing slowing it down.

Elon https://t.co/UaOY3wn4SZ
top_tweets.author: GeniusGTX
top_tweets.name: GeniusThinking
top_tweets.summary_zh: Marc Andreessen 指出 Elon Musk 一天進行 120 場設計審查，每場 5 分鐘，將每間公司視為生產流程並專注解決單一瓶頸。此工作方法展示了極端高效的產品管理模式。

top_tweets.text:
holy shit

Kimi K2.6 literally cooked claude design🤯

and it's 7x cheaper

try the same prompt on both Kimi and Claude design, and there are the outputs

see the exact same prompt 👇 https://t.co/7JDiP9XkAA
top_tweets.author: heygurisingh
top_tweets.name: Guri Singh
top_tweets.summary_zh: Kimi K2.6 在同樣的設計生成提示下，輸出品質可與 Claude 匹敵，但成本只有七分之一，值得產品設計工具選型時參考。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Ara
top_products.author: Adi Singh
top_products.tagline: Build an entire business by texting
top_products.summary_zh: 透過傳送文字訊息來建立與管理整個業務。適合需要快速啟動與運營業務的創業者或小型企業主。

top_products.title: PeekFocus
top_products.author: Sulochanal Chellian
top_products.tagline: One keystroke blurs everything behind your active window
top_products.summary_zh: 按下一個快捷鍵即可模糊當前作業視窗以外的所有內容，協助使用者專注於當前工作並減少視覺干擾。
